code:
import io
import string
import list

fn insert_unique(_ sorted: List<Int>, _ n: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut out: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  mut placed = false
  mut dup = false
  while i < sorted.len()
    match sorted.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if dup or placed
        out = list.push(out, v)
      else if v == n
        dup = true
        out = list.push(out, v)
      else if v > n
        out = list.push(out, n)
        out = list.push(out, v)
        placed = true
      else
        out = list.push(out, v)
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not placed and not dup
    out = list.push(out, n)
  end
  out
end

let text = io.read_to_end()
let tokens = string.split_whitespace(text)
mut sorted: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
while i < tokens.len()
  match tokens.get(i)
  when Some(tok)
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(n)
      sorted = insert_unique(sorted, n)
    when None
      ()
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

mut out = ""
mut k = 0
while k < sorted.len()
  match sorted.get(k)
  when Some(v)
    if k == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  k = k + 1
end
println(out)
